reviews.review_description: Playing left-handed on Oculus Go the angle to the fryer means the fridge is in the way and you can't make fries. I tried right-handed and it worked fine, but playing right-handed isn't really an option to me because of my nerve injury which makes this kind of use painful. Completely unplayable so far as I'm concerned
It’s pretty repetitive . The only thing you’re doing is upgrading your ingredients and standing in the same spot,  but you will look up and think “where did the time go?”

reviews.review_title: Needs fix for Samsung s8 Gear 2 4 online
reviews.review_description: In multiplayer the fries fall through trays when placing them on it. Can you please fix. I can't play my friend. It works good on the ouclus Go. Other than that it's a fun game

I have been beta testing this app and it was already really good!

Now its even better! The graphics are good, the gameplay is really fun and the controls are easy to get used to.
There's no lag as some 1star rates says... Guess its comments by low-end Gear VR phones like most 1stars on oculus Go games.

Grab it and see for yourself! I don't even like cooking games usually but in VR its something else! Really enjoyable and gets more and more challenging.

Honestly, when I first got into this game, I was personally not expecting to much, but when I got into it, a shocking amount of fun. The gameplay is fast and entertaining, and there are a bunch of fun little things like the fire in kitchens, throwing things at people and (still haven’t run into this yet, but the tutorial says so) the refrigerator doors breaking. Playing against opponents is a lot of fun, and the pressure can be nerve racking. While playing this game, I do think that overtime and higher levels, there should be more food items, like drinks and ketchup, and more specific orders asking for different combinations. This would make the gameplay even deeper. This may lead to cheaper upgrades, but this would still be a good idea in the long run. I would also like to see more restaurants, as well as even more types of people. I do like the tutorial, which explains things perfectly, and the level structure. The menu is also very well put together. One of my complaints though is that I haven’t failed quite yet (at level 15) and the levels are too easy. Maybe a bump up in difficulty? Awesome game so far, and can’t wait for updates!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the lengthy feedback.
We have taken your feedback into consideration. Currently we are working hard on full server multiplayer features and adding a new restaurant. You will get lifetime updates to all these new features for free.

reviews.review_description: So I am left handed and I was playing  with my brother, and the fridge was blocking the fries making me not be able to progress further but it is fun

I get to live out my restaurant-cooking fantasies without causing any real fires. 

While the upgrade system doesn't manifest itself in a very satisfying way, this game is still very fun. The graphics, sounds, and gameplay are all really good. If your a fan of cooking games, this is a long-awaited must-have.
Thanks! The game is very fun and fast with short time levels.

I was so excited to purchase this game.  However, it is deemed defective.  The pointer cannot reach the fryer button because there is blockage.  The refrigerator is in the way.  I requested a refund, but the request for a refund was denied.  I sent two emails to the developers; as a result, I got NO response.  I am upset because I wasted my hard-earned money.  No one seems to care.  Would the developers like it if they were ripped off?  If I can't play the game due to a glitch, I should be able to get a refund.  Uninstalling the game and reinstalling it did not work.  Money lost!!!

developer_response.body:
Dear Andrea Jemison,
We have already replied to your email from ajemison@cinci.rr.com one day before your complaint posting.
However we did not receive any response from you.
Your experience above was unprecedented. We need more information from you to help with troubleshooting.
Perhaps reply to our email from support@playspiritgames.com, so that we can assist you further?
Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Wen I went to play on other players with internet it jest frose and I like the part wen you rapidly throw bunns at the other waterus she starts walking in place
It call me skinny 😓😓😓😓 other then that is good

My daughter and I love playing each other in VR games, but this game has a glitch where whoever Initiates multiplayer mode, their fries keep disappearing off of the serving tray or you can hear them cooking but there’s nothing in the deep fryer.  Please fix because this is one of my favorite games!  I’m so disappointed. 😒 Otherwise in single player mode, great game!￼

developer_response.body:
thanks for notifying us about this.
We will come up with a fix in the next build.

reviews.review_title: Should NOT be rated E for everyone!!!
reviews.review_description: My little one was really looking forward to playing this game, and I bought it ahead of time for his birthday. (He hardly ever plays vr because we don’t want it to hurt his eyes, but we make an exception occasionally, and this was going to be one). A few minutes into it, he comes and tells me that there’s cursing and that a lady called him a “bloody sh*t” and it wasn’t even bleeped! I checked it out, and when you throw ingredients at someone, she says that with no bleep noise, and she says some other things that are just barely bleeped. And I don’t want my kids playing a game where anyone is obviously calling them a mf-er, even if it is partially bleeped out! I was appalled!!!  My little boy didn’t want to play any more and said I should “tell those people their game is bad.”  The game is probably fine otherwise, I don’t know, but it should NOT be rated for children if you are going to have the characters cursing. That’s just sad, messed up, and shameful. If you do happen to respond to this review and take out the cursing, I will happily change my bad opinion and my bad review. Have a nice day (and please don’t talk ugly around kids), thanks.

Pretty fun game and very entertaining 
I would suggest having more then one type of restaurant please

this is the best game I've played on the go yet you couldn't ask for a better cooking experience in virtual reality then this game right here cant wait to see what else the devs have in store for us in the future

I didn’t know what I was missing out on in life until I downloaded this game. The graphics are beautiful, the game play is fast and exciting, and multiplayer mode always has you striving for that win! The upgrades are an excellent rewards system and I love the leaderboards for the campaign levels! The controls are simple but that doesn’t mean each level is and that’s only one of the amazing things about CookingVR! 20/10 would recommend. If this games doesn’t win some serious recognition, I’ll be shocked.
Wow am i terrible but it is so fun and so different

Definitely one of my favourite games on the VR I play this all the time. I even got my 50 your mother addicted. I wish there was a way that you could reset your scores and start all again. I also wish there was more items.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! The system automatically passes your highest score of all time to the leaderboard. So there is no need to reset score.

reviews.review_title: Fun, but I get hand cramps
reviews.review_description: This is a super fun game! It gets harder as it goes on.  Just keep cooking and cooking before the other waitress steals your table. Gotta be quick or else your food catches on fire. I’m looking forward to trying multiplayer!  I would absolutely give it 5 stars, but everything you do is immediately around you, like it’s too close, my hand wicked cramps up from playing this. I am using the oculus controller. Maybe there’s a way to sort of push everything a foot further away from you, but I haven’t figured it out. Absolutely worth the price.
The more you play the more hectic it gets. Lookinh forward to the upcoming updates and new restaurants!
